telemetry: Add missing events for guardrail_rejected, legal gate waiting, and legal gate accepted in analytics.ts, leveraging existing trackEvent helpers.
testing: Implement minimal reproducible validation for mobile funnel if E2E infra absent, focusing on consent integration coverage.
ceo_console: Update UI to include actionable signals for mobile conversion rates by capture mode, without redesign.

avoid_overbuilding: Unnecessary full redesign of CEO console leading to scope creep
Over-instrumenting telemetry beyond required events causing performance overhead
must_have_tests: Updated unit tests for analytics and CEO monitoring
E2E tests for consent integration in /auditar flow
top_risks: Residual gaps in E2E coverage for mobile consent
Inaccurate telemetry if events not properly integrated
parsed.recommended_sequence_rationale: Start with telemetry to ensure data foundation, followed by testing for validation, and end with CEO console to leverage new data without inflating scope, aligning with minimal useful changes post-implementation.
